name: UNITED RENTALS, INC.
summary: United Rentals is the largest equipment rental company in the world, operates throughout the United States and Canada, and has a smaller presence in Europe, Australia and New Zealand. The table below presents key information about our business as of and for the years ended December31, 2025 and 2024. Our business is discussed in more detail below.
